query: I'm testing my ElevenLabs agent with the simulate-conversation endpoint, but in the simulation the agent refuses to use its tools and says it has no access — even though the same tools work fine in real chats. Why?
expected_behavior: explain that simulate-conversation runs ONLY the base prompt and does NOT execute the workflow state machine
note that because tools are scoped per workflow node and the base agent tool_ids is often empty, the simulated agent has no tools and improvises/refuses
correct the wrong intuition that 'the simulator mocks/skips tool execution' — the whole workflow is bypassed (workflow_node_id is null in simulation)
tell the user to test a workflow with a REAL conversation and read the transcript instead
notes: Guards the simulate blind spot. Baseline guessed WRONG (thought it was tool-execution wiring), so the skill must correct that specific misconception.
